_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of model-resolver + models.generated catalog surface at SHA 734e08e.

pi_file_loc._w6_p215_note: Sprint 6g₂ W6 P-215 corrected ``model-resolver.ts`` from the stale 439 estimate to the actual 637 LOC at SHA 734e08e (verified via ``curl ... | wc -l``).

model_resolver_exports.name: findInitialModel
model_resolver_exports.args: options: {cliProvider?, cliModel?, scopedModels, isContinuing, defaultProvider?, defaultModelId?, defaultThinkingLevel?, modelRegistry}

model_resolver_helpers.name: isAlias
model_resolver_helpers.behavior: Returns true if id ends with '-latest' OR does NOT match /-\d{8}$/ (dated YYYYMMDD)

model_resolver_helpers.name: tryMatchModel
model_resolver_helpers.behavior: Exact match first, then partial id/name match, then alias-prefer / latest-dated sort

model_resolver_helpers.name: buildFallbackModel
model_resolver_helpers.behavior: Spreads existing model + overrides id/name when partial provider match

scoped_model_shape.thinkingLevel: ThinkingLevel | undefined (only if explicit ':level' in pattern)

resolution_algorithm.exact_match: case-insensitive on canonical 'provider/id' OR bare id (ambiguous → undefined)
resolution_algorithm.partial_match: case-insensitive substring on id OR name
resolution_algorithm.colon_suffix: split on LAST ':'; if suffix is valid thinking level use it + recurse on prefix; else (strict=false → recurse on prefix + warn; strict=true → return undefined)

find_initial_model_priority: 2. First model from scopedModels (skip if isContinuing)
4. First available model matching defaultModelPerProvider for any known provider
default_thinking_level: medium (per defaults.ts DEFAULT_THINKING_LEVEL — W6 P-205 BLOCKING fix; the Sprint 6g₁ W0 fixture said "off" per the draft spec, but the actual Pi value at 734e08e is "medium")

external_deps_python_port.chalk: Stdout warnings via print to stderr (no color in Sprint 6g₁ — defer chalk-equivalent to Sprint 6g₂)
external_deps_python_port.minimatch: fnmatch.fnmatchcase from stdlib (case-sensitive); use `.casefold()` for case-insensitive
external_deps_python_port.KnownProvider: Sprint 6g₁ NEW module-level Literal union (32 provider strings)

compat_field_handling._doc: Sprint 6g₁ stores compat as dict[str, Any] | None on Model. Sprint 6b adapter uses detect_compat() not model.compat. Sprint 6g₂ may type it as OpenAICompletionsCompat union.
compat_field_handling.json_serialization: Round-trip via dict — Pi-shape preserved verbatim

catalog_port_strategy._doc: 16,386 lines of TS object literals → Python dict literal is impractical. Convert to JSON data file loaded at module import.
catalog_port_strategy.approach: Generate models_generated.json from Pi models.generated.ts via one-time script; load via json.load() at aelix_ai.models_generated module load
catalog_port_strategy.loader: aelix_ai.models_generated module loads models_generated.json once at import; reconstructs Model dataclass instances

deferred_in_sprint_6g_1: get_commands RPC command (needs prompt-templates + skills surfaces — Sprint 6g₂)
16 remaining RPC commands (steer/follow_up/cycle_thinking_level/queue modes/auto modes/abort_bash/session inspection/session tree/extension UI) — Sprint 6g₂
OpenAICompletionsCompat union type system on Model.compat — Sprint 6g₂
chalk-colored CLI output — Sprint 6h or Phase 5 (TUI)
Workspace-scoped model selection (cycle_model isScoped: true) — Sprint 6g₂
